subject: physics
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.39
question_html:
The half-life of a radioactive nuclide is 8.0 s. The initial activity of a pure sample of the nuclide is 10 000 Bq. What is the approximate activity of the sample after 4.0 s?

A. 2500 Bq

B. 5000 Bq

C. 7100 Bq

D. 7500 Bq
examiners_html: Roughly half of candidates (incorrectly) selected response D, without recognizing that the change in activity over time is not linear.
